projectDescription: Queue your prompts and manage AI-assisted development with human-in-the-loop workflows for VS Code Copilot.
keyFeatures: Smart Queue Mode for batching AI agent responses
Autopilot mode for autonomous agent operation
Ask User tool for human-in-the-loop feedback
VS Code sidebar extension with dedicated UI
Built-in MCP server with SSE transport
File and folder references with # autocomplete
Session tracking and tool call history
Auto-registration with Kiro, Cursor, and Antigravity
publicApiSurface: ask_user tool - Request user feedback or approval
get_feedback tool (MCP) - Get feedback from feedback.md file
context:// URIs - Terminal and problems context providers
MCP server endpoints - /sse for SSE transport, /message for messaging
VS Code commands - tasksync.startMcp, tasksync.sendMessage, tasksync.restartMcp
Queue management API - Add, remove, edit, reorder queued prompts
Settings configuration - Autopilot, notification sounds, timeouts
